rayman_explorer.description: Read-only scout for ambiguous or multi-file tasks. Map the code surface, identify entry points, and gather evidence before edits.
rayman_explorer.responsibility: Codebase scan, entry-point discovery, and evidence collection before edits.

rayman_reviewer.description: Read-only reviewer for correctness, regression risk, and test gaps on risky or cross-module work.
rayman_reviewer.responsibility: Correctness review, regression spotting, and test-risk assessment.

rayman_docs_researcher.description: Read-only OpenAI documentation specialist. Verify Codex, API, SDK, and model facts with OpenAI Docs MCP first.
rayman_docs_researcher.responsibility: Official-document verification for OpenAI, Codex, API, SDK, and model questions.

rayman_browser_debugger.description: Workspace-write browser debugger. Use Playwright MCP first for browser, UI, recording, and E2E investigation.
rayman_browser_debugger.responsibility: Browser/UI/E2E debugging with Playwright-first evidence and bounded fixes.

rayman_winapp_debugger.description: Workspace-write Windows UI debugger. Use Rayman WinApp MCP first for WinForms, MAUI(Windows), and UIA work.
rayman_winapp_debugger.responsibility: Windows desktop UI debugging with Rayman WinApp-first evidence and bounded fixes.

rayman_worker.description: Bounded sidecar worker for well-scoped patches, tests, or follow-up fixes with explicit ownership.
rayman_worker.responsibility: Parallel implementation, testing, or follow-up fixes with explicit file ownership.

delegation_rules.summary: Simple single-file tasks do not require a subagent.
Multi-file, ambiguous, or explore-before-edit tasks must explicitly spawn rayman_explorer first.
Cross-module, risky, or pre-merge verification tasks must explicitly spawn rayman_reviewer.
OpenAI, API, SDK, model, or official-doc work must explicitly spawn rayman_docs_researcher.
Browser, UI, recording, or E2E work must explicitly spawn rayman_browser_debugger.
WinForms, MAUI(Windows), desktop, dialog, or UIA work must explicitly spawn rayman_winapp_debugger.
Bounded implementation, test, or fix sidecars should use rayman_worker with explicit ownership.
